source: PoE2DB Crafting, Alloy, Liquid Emotions, Mark of the Abyssal Lord

methods.descriptionEn: Replace an existing modifier with a guaranteed crafted modifier.
Replace a modifier on a Rare Jewel with a guaranteed Crafted modifier.
Influences the next applicable crafting action while active in the inventory.
Adds an unrevealed Desecrated modifier selected at the Well of Souls.
Upgrades into a higher-tier unrevealed Desecrated modifier on Desecration.
